message.content: The screenshot displays three lines of text on a beige background. Each line contains the Unicode character sequence "u2694" (likely intended to represent a symbol, such as a sword, which should render as ✐ but appears as raw text here) followed by a name. The text is arranged vertically, with each line left-aligned. The first line reads "u2694 Saphayx", the second "u2694 Pharpax", and the third "u2694 Phainoth". The primary visual issue is that the Unicode character "u2694" is not rendering as a symbol but is instead displayed as plain text, disrupting the intended visual presentation. No other random characters, misaligned text, or diagram layout problems are visible.
